abilities.description: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own. If that permanent or card has a time counter on it, you may remove a time counter from it or put another time counter on it.

effect.description: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own. If that permanent or card has a time counter on it, you may remove a time counter from it or put another time counter on it.
effect.name: AddOrRemoveCounter

abilities.target_prompt: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own
